system: You are a static analysis assistant. You are tasked with identifying the expressions with specific patterns and reporting them along with their line numbers
task: I am going to detect the Absolute Path Traversal (APT) bugs. Now I am told that the argument of writeLine can cause the bugs. Hence, I want you to extract the arguments of the writeLine invocations and also report their corresponding line numbers. Think step by step and list pairs of a program line and an expression.
